description_long: This is a classical-style marble bust sculpture depicting the head and upper chest of a human figure, likely male, with finely detailed hair and facial features. The bust is mounted on a round, tiered pedestal base, also made of marble, which provides stability and an elegant presentation. The sculpture is unfinished or broken at the shoulders, with rough, jagged edges where the torso would continue. The back of the bust is flat and unadorned, indicating it was designed to be viewed primarily from the front and sides. The marble surface has a smooth, polished finish with subtle variations in color, ranging from creamy white to light beige. The overall appearance suggests a work inspired by Greco-Roman portraiture, suitable for display in public or cultural spaces.
description: A classical marble bust of a human figure with detailed hair and facial features, mounted on a round pedestal. The sculpture is smooth, polished, and unfinished at the shoulders.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the detailed face, hair, and the elegant pedestal base.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the facial features, hair texture, and the flat back of the bust.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned back and the rough, unfinished edges of the sculpture.
description_view_3: Right rear three-quarter view showing the hair detail, ear, and the transition from the bust to the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
